title: asplenium obovatum var. billotii
intro: Asplenium obovatum var. billotii, also known as the African maidenhair fern, is a variety of the Asplenium obovatum plant, a species of fern native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Asplenium obovatum var. billotii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or using the plant's extract to create topical applications.
